text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 257 

SSDI_IND 

LABEL: Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating if the beneficiary is enrolled in Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) administered 
via the Social Security Administration (SSA); most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SSDI_IND 

LONG NAME: SSDI_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
